## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Motivation

Link the related issue or explain the use case.

## Testing

List the commands you ran:

```shell
mvn test
```

## Compatibility

- [ ] This does not change public APIs.
- [ ] This changes public APIs and the impact is described above.
- [ ] This is a breaking change and migration impact is described above.

## Checklist

- [ ] The pull request is focused on one change.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated for new behavior.
- [ ] Documentation was added or updated when needed.
- [ ] Secrets, prompts, responses, and provider payloads are not logged without redaction.
- [ ] Commit messages follow `type(scope): summary`.
